title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: Sulakshana decides to train Bulbul to be a good wife instead of punishing her, a development which could change her mind forever.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Two best friends who support each other through thick and thin face a problem when circumstance causes both of them to get married to the same man.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Soumya strives to retain her individuality in a society that hates her for her identity. As she faces up to the discrimination, Soumya finds love in Harman, who becomes her biggest support in the battles to come.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Captain Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a Halloween party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea, Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol must help Alex find his backpack for the first day of school. After a storm causes a power outage, the PAW Patrol works to turn the lights back on.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Someone has been swiping fish off Cap'n Turbot's boat. Adventure Bay's newest dolphin pup accidentally swims into a shallow-water stream.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Jake and Everest are excited about the Snowboard Competition, until they see the course is buried under a blanket of snow. PAW Patrol sets out to retrieve Cap'n Turbot's sunken diving bell.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are watching white whales in Adventure Bay when their boat hits a rock and starts to sink. The PAW Patrol must track down some loose penguins and help them return to the land of ice and snow.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must chase down Mayor Humdinger and the Kit-tastrophe Crew when they steal gold discovered in Adventure Bay. Mayor Humdinger orders the Kit-tastrophe Crew to steal the Paw Patroller.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Marshall wakes from a nap to find a real, fire-breathing dragon guarding a sleeping Katie in the Lookout Tower. The pups build a house for three little piglets.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Motu learns forgiveness, but his newfound tolerance sets a dangerous thief free. Can he make up for his mistake?
